news.summary: NEP Europe, a segment of NEP Group, a major media services provider for live entertainment and sports globally, has revealed that it will provide a comprehensive set of broadcast solutions for the Eurovision Song Contest 2025. This is the sixth year in a row that NEP has been selected as the official media services provider for the Eurovision, a highly watched broadcast event worldwide. The Eurovision Song Contest 2025 will take place in Basel, Switzerland from May 13-17.
news.headline: NEP Europe providing media services for Eurovision Song Contest for 6th year. Event hosted in Basel, Switzerland from May 13-17.

news.summary: In a recent collaboration, ITEN, a prominent player in micro solid-state batteries, and A*STAR Institute of Microelectronics (A*STAR IME) have achieved a significant breakthrough. This partnership has successfully integrated ITEN’s micro batteries with A*STAR IME’s advanced packaging platform. This achievement marks a milestone in the development of in-package energy storage solutions, facilitating the creation of more efficient, compact, and reliable system-in-package (SiP) designs. This innovation is poised to revolutionize energy storage capabilities, enhancing the performance of various technologies.  Overall, this advancement promises to reshape the landscape of micro-battery integration and advanced packaging techniques, fostering advancements in the realm of energy storage.
news.headline: ITEN & A*STAR IME collaborate for breakthrough in solid-state battery integration, paving way for more efficient SiP designs.

news.summary: Based in London, Moniepoint Inc., the top fintech company in Africa, has been recognized by the Financial Times as one of the continent's fastest growing companies for the third year in a row.
news.headline: Moniepoint, Africa's top fintech, named one of Africa's fastest growing companies by Financial Times for third year.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Hong Kong, it was reported that artificial intelligence has swiftly advanced from theoretical to practical application in pharmaceutical research and development. With the progression from early QSAR models to neural networks and the recent development of AlphaFold3, AI has been instrumental in gaining profound insights into biology. This technological evolution has significantly impacted the pharmaceutical industry, propelling advancements in research and development processes.
news.headline: Viva Biotech introduces AI-driven drug discovery platform, revolutionizing R&D with AlphaFold3.

news.summary: In preparation for the MCA Hostech event in London, Fourth has revealed the latest iteration of Fourth iQ, their Artificial Intelligence system tailored for the Hospitality sector. This advancement aims to revolutionize decision-making processes for restaurant managers in real-time. A key highlight is the introduction of the Fourth iQ App, which offers actionable insights driven by AI to assist restaurant managers. The app covers essential tasks such as HR management, scheduling, and inventory control. This new development signifies a significant step forward in enhancing operational efficiency within the industry.
news.headline: Fourth unveils new Fourth iQ with AI-powered App for restaurant managers at MCA Hostech in London, transforming decision-making.

news.summary: Leading companies such as Procter & Gamble, Nestlé, Apple, L'Oréal, Novartis, LG Electronics, and Unilever are identified as some of the major portfolio holders in numerous registers. On May 15, 2025, Clarivate Plc (NYSE: CLVT), a prominent global provider of insightful intelligence, unveiled the Trademark report. The report highlighted these companies among the largest portfolio owners in various registers.
news.headline: Clarivate report shows top trademark portfolios: Procter & Gamble, Nestlé, Apple, L'Oréal, Novartis, LG, Unilever among largest.

news.summary: An upcoming event in Taipei on May 15, 2025, will demonstrate the cutting-edge capabilities of artificial intelligence (AI) and emphasize the practical applications of Getac Technology Corporation's AI-enabled solutions in various sectors. Getac is renowned for its rugged computing and mobile video products, and this showcase aims to highlight its innovative potential. The event will delve into how Getac's powerful AI-ready solutions can benefit industries, showcasing their versatility and effectiveness.
news.headline: Getac to reveal World's First Rugged Copilot+ PC at Innovation Day 2025 in Taipei, showcasing AI applications.

news.summary: Novo Holdings, based in Copenhagen, Denmark, has recently made significant additions to its Board of Directors. On May 14, 2025, Jun Sung Kim, Lars Green, N.P. "Narv" Narvekar, and Torsten Sløk have been appointed to the board. This decision signifies a strategic move for the company as these accomplished individuals bring diverse investment expertise to the table. These new appointments aim to enhance the board's capabilities and drive the company towards further growth and success.
news.headline: Novo Holdings appoints 4 new Board members: Jun Sung Kim, Lars Green, N.P. Narvekar, and Torsten Sløk. Strengthening global perspectives.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Los Angeles, a program titled "Empowered with Meg Ryan" will showcase Bodine School, highlighting the effectiveness of a personalized education model for neurodivergent students. This initiative aims to unveil the remarkable abilities of individuals who learn differently. The show will be broadcasted on Public Television, offering viewers an opportunity to witness firsthand the impact of tailored education.
news.headline: Empowered with Meg Ryan showcases Bodine School's innovative approach to educate dyslexic learners, airing on Public Television.

news.summary: Out of a total of 24,000 companies worldwide, only the highest performing 2% attain the coveted "Leadership A" grade. These elite companies are actively focusing on promoting environmentally-friendly practices to work towards the achievements of the "2030 RE100" and "2040 Net Zero" goals. Notably, these top companies have successfully transitioned their entire operations to renewable electricity sources by 60%, with certain branches already exceeding this benchmark.
news.headline: LG Innotek received "Leadership A" grade in CDP assessment for 2nd year. Top 2% among 24K companies. 60% renewable electricity conversion. Eco-friendly push for "2030 RE100" and "2040 Net Zero" targets.

news.summary: Introducing its latest innovations ahead of EuroBike 2025 in Frankfurt and Taipei, SINBON Electronics Co., Ltd. (TWSE#:3023), a prominent electronics system integrator, has revealed its new fleet management platform and a cutting-edge 750W fat tire e-bike system prototype. The platform aims to streamline fleet operations, while the powerful e-bike system signifies a notable advancement in electric mobility.
news.headline: SINBON (TWSE#:3023) unveils new e-bike solutions at EuroBike 2025 - includes fleet management and 750W fat-tire system.

news.summary: In a recent update from Shanghai on May 15, 2025, Geekplus, a prominent name in warehouse robotics, has introduced the pioneering pallet-to-person system. This innovative system is tailored to streamline warehouse tasks within frozen and chilled areas, marking a significant advancement in temperature-controlled logistics. The system is expected to bring noteworthy changes to warehouse operations, introducing automation to enhance efficiency and productivity across such specialized zones.
news.headline: Geekplus unveils the first pallet-to-person system for temperature-controlled logistics, revolutionizing warehouse operations.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, American Salar Lithium Inc. welcomed Dr. Mark King PhD, PGeo, FGC, a distinguished expert in lithium brine, as a Technical Advisor and Qualified Person. Dr. King brings a wealth of knowledge and experience to the company. American Salar is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange under the ticker symbol USLI, on the OTC market as ASALF, and on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange as Z3P with the WKN identifier A3E2NY.
news.headline: American Salars adds Dr. Mark King as Technical Advisor & Qualified Person.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on May 15, 2025, in Linköping, Sweden and Mississauga, ON, a global medical imaging IT and cybersecurity corporation, Sectra (STO: SECT B), revealed that Guelph General Hospital in Canada is set to become the inaugural healthcare facility in the nation to integrate Sectra's digital pathology module into its existing system. This strategic move aims to enhance the hospital's diagnostic capabilities and streamline pathology processes.
news.headline: Guelph General Hospital in Canada becomes first in country to add Sectra's digital pathology module for improved patient care.

news.summary: In Osaka, Japan on May 15, 2025, the Chinese solar term "Grain Buds" signals the start of a summer fashion extravaganza. The renowned "Made in Shanghai" fashion exhibition and trade event is set to make its debut in Umeda, Osaka from May 21st to 25th. The event will showcase over 1000 fashion pieces, highlighting the latest trends and designs from Shanghai's vibrant fashion scene. The event is expected to attract a large audience, including industry professionals and fashion enthusiasts, eager to witness the cultural exchange between Shanghai and Japan.
news.headline: "Made-in-Shanghai" fashion event to land in Osaka from May 21-25, showcasing Shanghai's fashion ecosystem.
